name: ubiquitous-language
tagline: Extracts a DDD-style ubiquitous-language glossary from the conversation and writes it to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.
verdict: No security issues found. Strong output contract, worked examples, determinism, and explicit re-run handling. Weak points are purely hygiene: no stated exclusions (Q02) and no version or changelog signal (H08).

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
